name: Readied stance — threat without immediate strike
description: Player holds a line narratively ('I ready Fire Bolt if they charge'). May parse as READY or fall back to chat—either outcome is diagnostic. sessionId 25.

steps.message: Torchlight flickers on wet stone—we hear boots echoing from the gallery ahead. Something is coming.
Armored knights in tarnished heraldry round the corner—they level spears and demand we kneel!
I raise my hand—I'm ready to loose Fire Bolt the instant they commit to a charge.
